titleStmt.title: SII 25.218: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 218. (A.R. No. 218 of 1908.) KŌVILŪR, PATTUKKOTTAI TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: East wall of the first prākāra of the Mantrapurīśvara temple.
This inscription may be assigned to c. 14th century on palaeographical considerations.

It records an arrangement (vyavasthai) made by the nāṭṭavar of Puṟaṅkarambai-nāḍu to provide 25 kalam of paddy, by raising crops in the maḍak-kāṇi of fifteen mā of lands obtained from the sabhaiyār, to the Paripūrṇṇaśivāchāryar who presided over the Kūttāḍunāyaṉār-maḍam in the western street of the tirumaḍaiviḷāgam of the temple of the deity Tiruvuśāttāṉam-uḍaiya-ṉāyaṉār of Uśāttāṉam alias Kēraḷakulāśaṉichchaturvēdimaṅgalam in Puṟaṅkarambai-nāḍu, in Rājēndraśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu. The Śaiva teacher belonged to the lineage (santāṉam) of Tiruchchattimuṟṟattumudaliyār. Among the boundaries of the lands obtained from the twelfth taram in the west side of the lake called Mahēndrapērēri of the above village are to the east of the eastern bank of the channel flowing into the lake from the Gaṇḍarādittaṉ-vāyttalai (head-sluice of the channel called Gaṇḍarādittaṉ), to the south of Vāḻavandanallūr, a dēvadāṉa of the deity Tiruvuśāttāṉam-uḍaiya-ṉāyaṉār, etc. This arrangement of the nāṭṭavar was attested by several signatories including the nāṭṭu-kaṇakku Perujñar-kiḻavaṉ Āḍavallāṉ and others (names mentioned).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ Irācentira coḻavaḷanāṭṭup puṟaṅkarampai nāṭṭu nāṭṭavarom vyavastaip paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu Innāṭṭu Ucāttāṉamāṉa keraḷaku
lācaṉic caruppeti maṅkalattu Uṭaiyār tiruvucāttāṉa muṭaiya nāyaṉār tirumaṭaviḷākattu melaitiruvitiyil kūttāṭunāyaṉār maṭattu Eḻu
ntaruḷi Irukkum tiruc cattimuṟṟattu mutaliyār cantāṉattu periṭam perukaniṉṟārāṉa paripūrṇṇaśivācāryyarkku Imahentirapperreriyil melaittalaip
parappil Ivvūr sabhaiyār pakkal maṭakkāṇiyākap paṉṉiraṇṭāntarattu koṇṭa nilattukku kiḻpāṟkellai vāḻavantanallūrkkiḻaic cuṟṟuk kulaiye
teṟku nokkip pontu Eri kiṟa vaḻikku meṟkum teṉpārkkellai Eriyil kaṇavāykku vaṭakkum melpārk kellai kaṇṭarātittaṉ vāyttalaiyil
niṉṟum Erikku nirpāykiṟa vāykkālil kiḻaikkaraikku kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai Uṭaiyār tiruvucāttāṉa muṭaiya nāyaṉār tevatāṉam vāḻavanta nallūrt teṟkic cuṟṟukkulai m Āka Icainta Innā
ṉkellaiyil kuḷḷumikitiThe letter ‘kiti’ is written below the line.kkuṟaivu Uḷḷaṭaṅka nilam patiṉaiñcumā Innilam ñca ṟṟiṉa nāḷil mutal payir Eṟāp pāḻāy neṭuneṟṟippaṭat tiruttip payiṟ ceytu veṇṭukaiya nilattu tāytta
ramāṉa paṉṉiraṇṭāntarattu tarappaṭi marakkāl va nellu Irupattaiṅkalamum Ivvūr sabhaiyār piramāṇam paṇṇikuṭuttapaṭiye koḷḷakkaṭavomākavum Innāṭu parappilelum payir pārttukka
ṭa mutal koḷḷalum Innilattukku Innellu Irupattaiṅkalame Eṭṭāvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu mutal koḷḷak kaṭavomāka vyavastai paṇṇik kuṭuttap puraṅkarampai nāṭṭu nāṭṭava� ko maṭa
ttu tirukkaṇ ṉ paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai paṭṭiyaṉ paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kuṇṭurcciṅkappirāṉ paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Ālikkoṉṟai cevakaṉ cevapaṭṭa Irācen
tira coḻappi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Ālik koṉṟai cevakaṉ tevapaṭṭa Irācen
tiracoḻappi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Ālikkoṉṟai Aḻakiya maṇavāḷa paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai ciri Aḻakiya maṇavāḷapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kārampāru ṉ Eḻuttu
§ Ippaṭikku Ivaiyimaṅkaḻanaṉ Aṅkāraṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Āṭikkuṭaiyāṉ Aḻaka viṭaṅkapperumāḷ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai nāṭṭu kaṇakku peruñār kiḻavaṉ Āṭavallāṉ Eḻuttu nta paṭṭaṉ
Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Eṭṭukkūr nārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Irāmpalūr tūyacoti paṭṭaṉaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai pārattuvāci tillai nāyaka paṭikku Ivai ti
ru nilakaṇṭaṉ Āḷuṭaiyāṉ paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Etirilicoḻaṉ periyanampi paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Ivvūr ṭaiyāṉ taṉmapaṭi ..
Digital edition of SII 25.218 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
